description:
Goal
Flatten compiler::World so it owns the fields currently wrapped by ExecutionWorld and PreparedNativeProgram directly. Remove the nested structs once World carries the authoritative execution and native-preparation state itself.

Signal
- compiler::World directly owns units, module, module_plan, sm, diagnostics, working, planned_program, and abi_facts state.
- ExecutionWorld and PreparedNativeProgram are deleted.
- Compiler and codegen continue to operate through mutable World state without reintroducing returned prep packages.
- The compiler/codegen/entrypoint regression tests and clippy pass.

Strategy
1. Move the wrapped fields onto World with coherent invalidation rules between execution prep and native prep.
2. Update compiler/codegen accessors and borrows to read World directly.
3. Remove the obsolete structs and rerun the targeted verification matrix.

References
- src/compiler.rs
- src/ir_codegen/driver.rs
- src/ir_codegen/mod.rs
- .agent/docs/single-authoritative-plan.md
title: Compiler World: flatten execution and native state fields
